scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('questions.json','utf8'));let ok=true;for(const q of d.questions){if(!q.options.includes(q.correct)||q.options.length!==4||new Set(q.options).size!==4)ok=false;}console.log(ok?'All questions valid':'INVALID');process.exit(ok?0:1)"
